signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% and unchanged from the central bank's 2% target amid contained price pressures.[1]  
Slight variations exist across sources (2.16% per rateinflation.com[3]; 2.2% per Trading Economics[1]), but
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
